scripts.compile:marble: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-marble build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-marble compile
scripts.compile:brick-breaker: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-brick-breaker build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-brick-breaker compile
scripts.compile:aurora: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-aurora build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-aurora compile
scripts.compile:phaseglass: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-phaseglass build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-phaseglass compile
scripts.compile:vortex-loom: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-vortex-loom build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-vortex-loom compile
scripts.compile:spectral-bloom: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-spectral-bloom build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-spectral-bloom compile
scripts.compile:metro: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-metro build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-metro compile
scripts.compile:painting: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-painting build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-painting compile
scripts.compile:runner: corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-runner build && corepack pnpm --filter @reaper-viz/compiler-runner compile
scripts.check: corepack pnpm check:determinism && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test
